framework.name: Finanstilsynet ICT Requirements
framework.scope: ICT security and risk management requirements for Danish financial companies including DORA implementation
framework.structure_description: Requirements organized by domains: ICT governance, risk management, ICT security, outsourcing, incident management, continuity, and DORA implementation.

controls.title: Board responsibility for ICT risk management
controls.description: The board must approve and regularly review the organization ICT risk management strategy and ensure adequate resources are allocated.
controls.description_nl: Bestyrelsen skal godkende og regelmaeessigt gennemga organisationens IKT-risikostyringsstrategi og sikre at der er tilstraekkelige ressourcer.
controls.implementation_guidance: Bestyrelsen skal orienteres minimum kvartalsmaeessigt om IKT-risikosituationen. IKT-risiko skal indga i den overordnede risikostyring.

controls.title: ICT risk management function
controls.description: The company must have a dedicated ICT risk management function with sufficient independence, competence, and resources.
controls.description_nl: Virksomheden skal have en dedikeret IKT-risikostyringsfunktion med tilstraekkeligt uafhaengighed, kompetence og ressourcer.

controls.title: ICT security policy for financial companies
controls.description: The company must have an approved ICT security policy that establishes the framework for information security and is based on risk assessment.
controls.description_nl: Virksomheden skal have en godkendt IKT-sikkerhedspolitik der fastlaegger rammer for informationssikkerhed og er baseret pa risikovurdering.

controls.title: ICT risk assessment and treatment
controls.description: The company must conduct regular ICT risk assessment and implement risk-reducing measures for identified risks.
controls.description_nl: Virksomheden skal gennemfoere regelmaeessig IKT-risikovurdering og implementere risikoreducerende foranstaltninger for identificerede risici.

controls.title: ICT asset inventory and classification
controls.description: The company must maintain a complete inventory of all ICT assets and classify them by criticality and risk.
controls.description_nl: Virksomheden skal opretholde en komplet oversigt over alle IKT-aktiver og klassificere dem efter kritikalitet og risiko.

controls.title: ICT threat and vulnerability assessment
controls.description: The company must continuously assess threats and vulnerabilities against its ICT systems with particular focus on critical business systems.
controls.description_nl: Virksomheden skal loebende vurdere trusler og sarbarheder mod sine IKT-systemer med saerligt fokus pa kritiske forretningssystemer.

controls.title: Access control in financial systems
controls.description: Access to financial systems must be managed based on roles and the principle of least privilege with MFA for all critical systems.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til finansielle systemer skal styres baseret pa roller og mindste-privilegium-princippet med MFA for alle kritiske systemer.

controls.title: Privileged access management in financial sector
controls.description: Privileged accounts must be managed via PAM solution with just-in-time access, session recording, and automatic rotation.
controls.description_nl: Privilegerede konti skal administreres via PAM-loesning med just-in-time adgang, sessionoptagelse og automatisk rotation.

controls.title: Network security for financial systems
controls.description: Financial systems must be protected with segmented networks, IDS/IPS, and encrypted communication between all system components.
controls.description_nl: Finansielle systemer skal beskyttes med segmenterede netvaerk, IDS/IPS og krypteret kommunikation mellem alle systemkomponenter.

controls.title: Encryption of financial data
controls.description: Financial data must be encrypted in transit and at rest with approved encryption algorithms. Encryption keys must be formally managed.
controls.description_nl: Finansielle data skal krypteres i transit og i hvile med godkendte krypteringsalgoritmer. Krypteringsnoegler skal styres formelt.

controls.title: Audit trail for financial transactions
controls.description: All financial transactions and administrative actions must be logged with a complete audit trail retained for at least 5 years.
controls.description_nl: Alle finansielle transaktioner og administrative handlinger skal logges med komplet audit trail der opbevares i mindst 5 ar.

controls.title: Risk assessment of ICT outsourcing
controls.description: Before outsourcing critical ICT functions, the company must conduct a thorough risk assessment including evaluation of the vendor financial stability.
controls.description_nl: Foer outsourcing af kritiske IKT-funktioner skal virksomheden gennemfoere en grundig risikovurdering inklusiv vurdering af leverandoerens soliditet.

controls.title: Control of ICT outsourcing agreements
controls.description: Outsourcing agreements must contain specific ICT security requirements, audit rights, and requirements for reporting significant incidents.
controls.description_nl: Outsourcingaftaler skal indeholde specifikke IKT-sikkerhedskrav, auditrettigheder og krav om rapportering af vasentlige haendelser.

controls.title: Cloud outsourcing for financial companies
controls.description: When using cloud services, the company must ensure compliance with the FSA outsourcing requirements including data location and audit access.
controls.description_nl: Ved brug af cloud-tjenester skal virksomheden sikre at Finanstilsynets krav til outsourcing overholdes inklusiv dataplacering og auditadgang.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anmeld vasentlig IKT-outsourcing til Finanstilsynet. Sikr at data opbevares inden for EU/EOS.

controls.title: Management of sub-outsourcing
controls.description: The company must have approval rights over the vendor sub-outsourcing of critical ICT services.
controls.description_nl: Virksomheden skal have godkendelsesret over leverandoerens videre-outsourcing af kritiske IKT-tjenester.

controls.title: ICT incident handling process
controls.description: The company must have a documented ICT incident handling process with clear roles, escalation, and communication plans.
controls.description_nl: Virksomheden skal have en dokumenteret IKT-incidenthandteringsproces med klare roller, eskalering og kommunikationsplaner.

controls.title: Reporting of ICT incidents to FSA
controls.description: Significant ICT incidents must be reported to the FSA within the established deadlines in accordance with the reporting executive order.
controls.description_nl: Vasentlige IKT-haendelser skal rapporteres til Finanstilsynet inden for de fastsatte tidsfrister i henhold til bekendtgorelse om rapportering.
controls.implementation_guidance: Rapporter via Finanstilsynets digitale indberetningsloesning. Foelg op med root cause-analyse.

controls.title: ICT contingency plan for financial companies
controls.description: The company must have an ICT contingency plan that ensures continued operation of critical financial services during ICT disruptions.
controls.description_nl: Virksomheden skal have en IKT-beredskabsplan der sikrer fortsat drift af kritiske finansielle tjenester ved IKT-forstyrrelser.

controls.title: Testing of ICT contingency plans
controls.description: ICT contingency plans must be tested at least annually with realistic scenarios including cyber attacks and vendor outages.
controls.description_nl: IKT-beredskabsplaner skal testes mindst arligt med realistiske scenarier inklusiv cyberangreb og leverandoernedbrud.

controls.title: Backup and recovery of financial data
controls.title_nl: Backup og gendannelse af finansielle data
controls.description: Financial data must be backed up with defined RPO and RTO. Recovery must be tested regularly.
controls.description_nl: Finansielle data skal sikkerhedskopieres med definerede RPO og RTO. Gendannelse skal testes regelmaeessigt.

controls.title: ICT risk management framework (DORA Art. 6)
controls.description: The company must implement an ICT risk management framework in accordance with DORA with strategies, policies, and procedures for digital operational resilience.
controls.description_nl: Virksomheden skal implementere en IKT-risikostyringsramme i henhold til DORA med strategier, politikker og procedurer for digital operationel resiliens.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer DORA-krav trinvist. Start med gap-analyse mod nuvaerende IKT-governance.

controls.title: Threat-led penetration testing (TLPT)
controls.description: Systemically important financial companies must conduct threat-led penetration testing (TLPT) at least every three years.
controls.description_nl: Systemisk vigtige finansielle virksomheder skal gennemfoere trusselsbaseret penetrationstest (TLPT) mindst hvert tredje ar.

controls.title: ICT incident reporting under DORA
controls.description: Significant ICT-related incidents must be reported to the FSA within the deadlines DORA establishes (initial within 4 hours).
controls.description_nl: Vasentlige IKT-relaterede haendelser skal rapporteres til Finanstilsynet inden for de tidsfrister DORA fastsaetter (initial inden 4 timer).

controls.title: ICT third-party risk management (DORA)
controls.description: The company must maintain a register of all ICT third-party providers and assess risks associated with concentration and dependency.
controls.description_nl: Virksomheden skal have et register over alle IKT-tredjepartsudbydere og vurdere risici forbundet med koncentration og afhaengighed.
